summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control post-refactoring (App.js split into 14 files). All 17 requested features tested and verified working. The refactoring from monolithic App.js to separate pages/ and components/ files was successful - all functionality preserved.
passed_tests: Model Selector: new thread (no activeThread) shows 'Select model' text
Model Selector: selecting a model updates trigger text to selected model name (e.g., 'Qwen3-Coder-480B')
Model Selector: hovering provider with 8+ models shows 'More...' expand button (tested Venice with 30 models)
Model Selector: clicking 'More...' expands to show all models and hides the button
Model Selector: all 6 providers visible (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice)
Thread Management: 'New thread' button clears model selector to 'Select model'
Thread Management: sending message creates thread in Recents sidebar with model name shown below title
Thread Management: thread sidebar shows model name indicator (e.g., 'Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B...')
Page Navigation: Chat '/' renders correctly with OpenClaw title and input bar
Page Navigation: Dashboard '/dashboard' renders with Active Jobs, Pending Approvals stats
Page Navigation: Jobs '/jobs' renders with Active/History sections
Page Navigation: Approvals '/approvals' renders with approval cards
Page Navigation: Spaces '/spaces' renders with space cards
Page Navigation: Settings '/settings' renders with all 5 tabs (General, Profile, Connected Apps, Data, Security)
Page Navigation: Cowork '/cowork' renders with 'Delegate to OpenClaw' title and task cards
Page Navigation: Customize '/customize' renders with Directory and 3 tabs (Skills, Connectors, Plugins)
Page Navigation: Agent '/agent' renders with Agent Mode and capability toggles
Page Navigation: Code '/code' renders with Terminal and bypass permissions toggle
Sidebar: all nav items link to correct pages (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
Layout: sidebar, header, Chat/Cowork/Code tabs all render correctly
PlusMenu: opens and shows all 8 menu items (files, spaces, skills, connectors, plugins, research, web search, style)
PlusMenu: Skills submenu shows skill list + 'Manage skills' + 'Add skill'
PlusMenu: Connectors submenu shows all connectors with toggles + 'Manage connectors'
PlusMenu: Style submenu shows Normal, Concise, Formal, Explanatory options
Cowork page: task cards render and clicking opens inline conversation with progress panel
Settings page: all 5 tabs render and switch correctly (General, Profile, Connected Apps, Data, Security)
Customize page: all 3 tabs render (Skills, Connectors, Plugins) with search functionality
Agent page: 4 capability toggles work (imageGen, design, codeExec, webBrowse)
Agent page: input sends message and shows agent response
Code page: terminal input present and functional
Code page: bypass permissions toggle works (shows 'Permissions bypassed' when active)
Mode toggle button: switches between Agent and Research modes
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-refactoring testing complete. App.js was successfully split from ~1900 lines to ~30 lines with 10 page components and 4 shared components. All features verified working: Model Selector with 6 providers, 'More...' expand for large provider lists, model-thread linking. Thread management with model tracking (modelId stored per thread, shown in sidebar). PlusMenu with all submenus. All 10 pages render correctly. Settings with 5 tabs, Customize with 3 tabs, Agent with capability toggles, Code with terminal and bypass toggle. Key data-testids: model-selector-trigger, model-show-more-btn, models-scroll-container, new-thread-btn, chat-input, send-btn, plus-menu-trigger, mode-toggle-btn, cowork-task-*, settings-tab-*, customize-tab-*, agent-cap-*, terminal-input, bypass-permissions-toggle.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), toggleConnector/toggleSkill/togglePlugin (state updates), createThread/deleteThread/setActiveThread (state updates), all settings updates (state updates)
